calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: LaVon Granger. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2003 Continued To Jan-13-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On April 28, 2003.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. JoAnn Prior.
Appearances:
Jeffrey Mitchell, Esq. for Petitioner: Rosalind Calloway the grand mother, present as guardian ad litem for Dominic J. Calloway, a minor, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of the medical report by Dr. McAninch and evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise: $43,000.00.
Attorney's fees: $10,066.89.
Costs: $2,732.42.
A net balance of $30,200.69 to be deposited into a blocked account with
First Republic Bank, 111 Pine Street, San Francisco
until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Counsel to prepare order.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Erik Petersen, Esq. for PLaintiff, Dominic Calloway a minor, present with the Guardian ad litem Rosalind Calloway.
